anchor.note: fixed native-canvas placement, same aperture as prop_tv_screen_off. Pair with static_b, alternate for a flicker animation.

review_notes: Deterministic seeded 5-tone dither noise (soot_0/soot_1/cyan_0/cyan_1/cyan_2) with a corner vignette so the tube shape reads through the static. static_a/static_b share the same average luminance/tone distribution and differ only in noise seed (11 vs 97) — engine alternates them for flicker without a brightness strobe (photosensitivity-safe per spec §4/ART_BIBLE §9). Palette-clean via check-palette.ts. Inspected at 8x.
